description: Amazon Nova Multimodal Embeddings is a new state-of-the-art embedding model disponible in Amazon Bedrock. It is the industry’s first embedding model that supports text, documents, images, video, and audio through a single unified model, enabling cross-modal retrieval and semantic search applications with leading accuracy, at industry-leading costs.

title: présentation de AWS RTB Fabric for real-time advertising technology workloads
description: AWS RTB Fabric is a fully managed service designed for real-time bidding advertising workloads that enables AdTech companies to connect with their supply and demand partners through a dedicated, high-performance network environment, delivering single-digit millisecond performance and up to 80% lower networking costs compared to standard cloud connections while eliminating the need for colocation infrastructure or upfront commitments.

title: Monitor, analyze, and manage capacity usage from a single interface with Amazon EC2 Capacity Manager
description: Amazon EC2 Capacity Manager is a new centralized solution that consolidates capacity surveillance and gestion across all AWS accounts and regions, eliminating operational overhead and providing optimization opportunities for EC2 infrastructure at scale.

title: présentation de Amazon EBS Volume Clones: Create instant copies of your EBS volumes
description: AWS launched Amazon EBS Volume Clones, a new capability that allows users to create instant point-in-time copies of EBS volumes within the same disponibilité Zone with a single API call, eliminating the previous multi-step process of taking snapshots and creating volumes from them.

title: AWS Transfer Family SFTP connectors now support VPC-based connectivity
description: AWS Transfer Family SFTP connectors now support VPC-based connectivity, allowing secure file transfers between Amazon S3 and remote SFTP servers through your existing VPC infrastructure without exposing endpoints to the internet.

title: Announcing Amazon Quick Suite: your agentic teammate for answering questions and taking action
description: Amazon has announced Quick Suite, a new AI-powered workspace that combines research, business intelligence, and automatisation tools to help users analyze data and streamline workflows all in one place.

title: New general-purpose Amazon EC2 M8a instances are maintenant disponible
description: Amazon EC2 has launched new M8a instances powered by 5th Generation AMD EPYC processors, offering up to 30% better performance and 19% better price performance compared to M7a instances, along with improved memory bandwidth, networking, and stockage capabilities for various general-purpose workloads.

title: présentation de new compute-optimized Amazon EC2 C8i and C8i-flex instances
description: AWS launched compute-optimized C8i and C8i-flex EC2 instances powered by custom Intel Xeon 6 processors disponible only on AWS to offer up to 15% better price performance, 20% higher performance, and 2.5 times more memory throughput compared to previous generations.

title: AWS IAM Identity Center now supports customer-managed KMS keys for chiffrement at rest
description: Gain control over chiffrement and comply with regulations using customer-managed keys for AWS IAM Identity Center's user data and passwords.

title: Announcing Amazon ECS Managed Instances for containerized applications
description: Amazon ECS Managed Instances is a new compute option that eliminates infrastructure gestion overhead while giving you access to the broad suite of EC2 capabilities including the flexibility to select instance types, access reserved capacity, and advanced sécurité and observability configurations.

title: Announcing AWS Outposts third-party stockage integration with Dell and HPE
description: AWS Outposts is now integrated with Dell PowerStore and HPE Alletra MP B10000 systems, enabling customers to seamlessly use their on-premises external stockage infrastructure with AWS services while maintaining data residency requirements.
